calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Continued To Aug-12-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GROUP DELTA CONSULTANTS, INC.'s MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant's unopposed motion to compel arbitration and stay the civil case is granted.

Defendant shall submit a form of order and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)
